summary: Frontend-only E2E testing of the NEW 'Envíalo' money-transfer template (Chile -> LATAM) at https://patitas-services.preview.emergentagent.com. All 7 review-request features verified working. Coverage: (1) RootSelector /#/ shows demo-envialo card (plus demo-ecommerce=AURUM & demo-servicios=PATITAS) and navigates to /#/envialo. (2) EnvialoHome quote-card: switching quote-country (PE) and quote-amount (150000) updates rate/commission/total/received and quote-continue-btn navigates to /#/envialo/enviar?pais=PE&monto=150000. (3) Send flow ONLINE (VE + method-pagomovil + pay-mercadopago): 4-step wizard with rec-bankcode, rec-phone, rec-doc validated, confirm button label 'Pagar $102.990', ~2.6s processing, success screen [send-success] with tracking ENV-XXXXXXXX and status 'En proceso'. (4) Send flow CASH (PE + method-bank + pay-efectivo): confirm button label correctly changes to 'Generar pago en efectivo', after processing a DIFFERENT success screen [send-success-cash] appears with [payment-ref]=PAG-XXXXXXXX (8 digits), monto a pagar, list of 4 sucursales (Envíalo Centro/Providencia/Estación Central/Maipú), tracking N° ENV-XXXXXXXX, and 'Estado actual: Pago pendiente' badge. (5) Tracking /#/envialo/seguimiento: invalid code shows [tracking-notfound]; valid cash code shows [tracking-result] with first-step label 'Pago pendiente en sucursal' as current (Estado actual); valid online code shows first-step label 'Solicitud recibida'. (6) Admin /#/envialo/admin: admin@demo.com / admin123 login opens dashboard with stats + Transacciones table; cash row initial [status-<id>] = 'pendiente'; changing to 'en_proceso' triggers toast 'Estado actualizado' AND persists in localStorage envialo_transfers_v1; view-<id> opens [transfer-detail] dialog showing recipient (Maria Lopez, BCP, 1234567890, 12345678) and 'Método de pago: Pago en efectivo'. (7) Regression: AURUM /#/ecommerce & /#/ecommerce/catalogo, PATITAS /#/servicios & /#/servicios/tienda all load without runtime errors.

issues: Radix Dialog opens with a toast/overlay that visually overlaps the dialog content briefly (see screenshot). Not blocking — dialog is interactive — but the layered blur+toast combo reduces readability for ~1s. Minor cosmetic only.

critical_code_review_comments: SendMoney.jsx handleConfirm cleanly branches: status='pendiente'+paymentRef='PAG-'+Date.now().slice(-8) only when payment==='efectivo', else status='en_proceso' with paymentRef=null. Success screen also branches on confirmed.payment==='efectivo' rendering send-success-cash vs send-success — implementation matches spec 1:1.

Tracking.jsx stepsFor(t) correctly returns the 'Pago pendiente en sucursal' label for cash transfers and 'Solicitud recibida' for others; rank map treats {pendiente:0, recibido:0} equivalently so pending cash transfers correctly mark the first step as current.

AppContext addTransfer respects data.status (does NOT force en_proceso) which is essential for cash flow — verified via localStorage inspection that cash transfer persists with status='pendiente' until admin flips it.

Admin table's status <select data-testid='status-<id>'> uses controlled value bound to t.status and updateTransferStatus persists to localStorage — verified round-trip pendiente→en_proceso persists across page reads.

Harmless dev-only console noise: React hydration warning '<span> cannot be a child of <select>/<tr>/<tbody>' comes from the Emergent preview visual-editor injector wrapping every dynamic child in a <span data-ve-dynamic=true>. NOT from app code. Ignore per agent_to_agent_context_note.
Nice UX detail: confirm-send-btn label dynamically changes to 'Generar pago en efectivo' when pay-efectivo is selected — makes the different flow obvious to the user before clicking.
Cart/state isolation between the 3 templates is preserved (aurum_cart_v1 vs patitas_cart_v1 vs envialo_transfers_v1). No cross-contamination observed.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (18/18 review-request assertions across 2 flows + tracking + admin + 4 regressions)

test_credentials: Admin: admin@demo.com / admin123 (verified working on /#/envialo/admin — reuses useApp().login).
seed_data_creation: None — seedCountries (CL->PE/CO/VE/BO/AR/MX), payoutMethods (bank/cash/wallet/pagomovil), venezuelaBanks (0102 BDV, 0105 Mercantil, 0134 Banesco, 0108 Provincial ...), paymentMethods (transferencia/mercadopago/efectivo), seedSucursales (4 Envíalo branches) are all hydrated from /src/data/seedData.js.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Envíalo is fully verified. Key selectors: quote-card, quote-country, quote-amount, quote-continue-btn, cta-enviar-btn, send-money-page, step-monto/entrega/destinatario/pago, method-{bank|cash|wallet|pagomovil}, rec-{fullname|bank|account|phone|doc|bankcode}, pay-{transferencia|mercadopago|efectivo}, next-btn, prev-btn, confirm-send-btn, send-processing, send-success, send-success-cash, payment-ref, copy-ref-btn, go-tracking-btn, tracking-page, tracking-input, tracking-search-btn, tracking-result, tracking-notfound, admin-email, admin-password, admin-login-btn, status-<id>, view-<id>, transfer-detail. LocalStorage key: envialo_transfers_v1. Processing delay ~2.6s (wait_for_selector timeout>=6000ms). To generate a cash transfer for testing tracking/admin without redoing the wizard: visit /#/envialo/enviar?pais=PE&monto=150000, next->method-bank->next->fill rec-fullname+rec-bank+rec-account+rec-doc->next->pay-efectivo->confirm-send-btn. Reference format: PAG-XXXXXXXX (last 8 digits of Date.now()) and ENV-XXXXXXXX share the same suffix.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. All 7 features in the review request are implemented per spec — cash payment correctly generates PAG- reference + sucursales list + status=pendiente + tracking timeline with 'Pago pendiente en sucursal' as first step; online payments correctly produce status=en_proceso; admin can flip pendiente→en_proceso and update persists; regressions on AURUM & PATITAS templates unaffected.
